kodak_portra_160.name: Kodak Portra 160
kodak_portra_160.summary: Fine-grained, low-contrast portrait negative with soft, natural skin tones and gentle color.

kodak_portra_400.name: Kodak Portra 400
kodak_portra_400.summary: Warm, forgiving, and gentle on skin; the classic all-round wedding and portrait negative.

kodak_portra_800.name: Kodak Portra 800
kodak_portra_800.summary: One of the last fast color negatives, holding Portra's natural palette into low light.

kodak_portra_800_push1.name: Kodak Portra 800 (Push +1)
kodak_portra_800_push1.summary: Portra 800 rated at EI 1600 and pushed one stop for added speed, contrast, and grain.

kodak_portra_800_push2.name: Kodak Portra 800 (Push +2)
kodak_portra_800_push2.summary: Portra 800 rated at EI 3200 and pushed two stops for available-light work, with bold grain and contrast.

kodak_ektar_100.name: Kodak Ektar 100
kodak_ektar_100.summary: The world's finest-grain color negative, prized for vivid, saturated landscape color.

kodak_gold_200.name: Kodak Gold 200
kodak_gold_200.summary: A nostalgic consumer film with warm yellows and golds made for sunny, golden-hour snapshots.

kodak_ultramax_400.name: Kodak UltraMax 400
kodak_ultramax_400.summary: A punchy, versatile consumer 400 with vibrant color and a pleasing, gritty grain.

fujifilm_pro_400h.name: Fujifilm Pro 400H
fujifilm_pro_400h.summary: A discontinued professional film famed for airy pastels, cool greens, and soft skin via its fourth color layer.

fujifilm_c200.name: Fujifilm C200
fujifilm_c200.summary: An economical everyday negative with crisp, slightly cool color and accurate skin tones.

fujifilm_xtra_400.name: Fujifilm Superia X-TRA 400
fujifilm_xtra_400.summary: A versatile consumer 400 with a fourth color layer for cleaner tones under mixed light.

kodak_ektachrome_100.name: Kodak Ektachrome E100
kodak_ektachrome_100.summary: A revived E-6 slide with clean neutrals, fine grain, and a wide tonal range for a reversal film.

fujifilm_provia_100f.name: Fujifilm Provia 100F
fujifilm_provia_100f.summary: The reference E-6 transparency: natural, accurate color with modest contrast and fine grain.

fujifilm_velvia_100.name: Fujifilm Velvia 100
fujifilm_velvia_100.summary: High-contrast, ultra-saturated slide film beloved by landscape shooters for its punchy color.

kodak_kodachrome_64.name: Kodak Kodachrome 64
kodak_kodachrome_64.summary: The legendary K-14 slide (discontinued 2009) with rich, archival color and a distinctive warm signature.

kodak_vision3_50d.name: Kodak Vision3 50D (5203/7203)
kodak_vision3_50d.summary: The sharpest, finest-grained Vision3 stock, daylight-balanced for crisp bright-light cinematography.

kodak_vision3_250d.name: Kodak Vision3 250D (5207/7207)
kodak_vision3_250d.summary: A medium-speed daylight cine negative balancing fine grain with broad exposure latitude.

kodak_vision3_200t.name: Kodak Vision3 200T (5213/7213)
kodak_vision3_200t.summary: A tungsten-balanced cine negative offering low grain and rich color under artificial light.

kodak_vision3_500t.name: Kodak Vision3 500T (5219/7219)
kodak_vision3_500t.summary: The fast, tungsten-balanced workhorse of digital-era film, strong in low light with wide dynamic range.

kodak_verita_200d.name: Kodak Verita 200D (5206/7206)
kodak_verita_200d.summary: A new daylight cine negative with bold saturation, warm skin, and a shorter, classically cinematic range.

kodak_2383.name: Kodak Vision Color Print Film 2383
kodak_2383.summary: The standard theatrical release print stock, giving rich blacks and neutral highlights on screen.

kodak_2393.name: Kodak Vision Premier Color Print Film 2393
kodak_2393.summary: A premium print stock with deeper blacks, brighter highlights, and greater color saturation than 2383.

kodak_portra_endura.name: Kodak Professional Portra Endura
kodak_portra_endura.summary: A low-contrast RA-4 paper delivering natural flesh tones and moderate, restrained color saturation.

kodak_supra_endura.name: Kodak Professional Supra Endura
kodak_supra_endura.summary: A moderate-contrast RA-4 paper with accurate skin and livelier saturation for vivid general prints.

kodak_ultra_endura.name: Kodak Professional Ultra Endura
kodak_ultra_endura.summary: A high-contrast RA-4 paper with blacker blacks and bold saturation for high-impact display prints.

kodak_endura_premier.name: Kodak Professional Endura Premier
kodak_endura_premier.summary: Kodak's last surviving RA-4 paper, with tunable contrast and exceptional 100+ year image stability.

kodak_ektacolor_edge.name: Kodak Ektacolor Edge
kodak_ektacolor_edge.summary: A consumer/minilab RA-4 paper tuned for natural skin tones and rich, compelling everyday color.

fujifilm_crystal_archive_typeii.name: Fujifilm Crystal Archive Type II
fujifilm_crystal_archive_typeii.summary: Fuji's benchmark RA-4 paper with rich gradation, vivid color, and outstanding color stability.
